message:
fix: remove unused mut qualifiers and reorder imports for consistency

Remove unnecessary `mut` bindings from variables that are never mutated
across 13 files, reducing compiler warnings and improving readability.
Also alphabetically reorders imports for uniformity.

Affected modules:
  - actor.rs: remove unused mut on handle binding
  - app.rs: remove 4 unnecessary mut qualifiers on spawn/join handles
  - channel/oneshot.rs: remove mut from 23 receiver bindings where
    recv() no longer requires &mut self after prior API change
  - channel/session.rs: remove 3 unnecessary mut qualifiers
  - cx/scope.rs: remove 7 unused mut bindings on scope join handles,
    reorder imports alphabetically
  - gen_server.rs: realign error arm patterns and remove mut on reply_rx
  - plan/fixtures.rs: reorder imports alphabetically
  - plan/mod.rs: simplify variable bindings, remove unused mut,
    reorder imports (-12 lines net)
  - remote.rs: remove 2 unnecessary mut qualifiers
  - runtime/task_handle.rs: remove mut from 9 handle bindings
  - sync/pool.rs: expand pool management with clearer control flow (+10 lines)
  - transport/router.rs: simplify routing logic, reduce nesting (+42/-42)
  - tests/distributed_spawn.rs: align with updated spawn API

No behavioral changes. All modifications are mechanical cleanup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
